---
id: disable-profile
title: "Disable a Profile"
description: "Pauses window scheduling without deleting configuration."
sidebar_label: "Disable a Profile"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/transform-platform-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Disable a Profile"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/profiles/{profileId}/disable"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Pauses window scheduling without deleting configuration.
In-flight windows will complete normally.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
